title: Landing Page Design
summary: A conversion-focused landing page concept with clear messaging, strong hierarchy and purposeful sections.
outcome: A layout where message, proof and action all sit in the right order for a first-time visitor.

seo.title: Landing Page Concept — UI/UX | Shubham Pendse
seo.description: A conversion-focused landing page concept exploring clear messaging, strong hierarchy and purposeful sections.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: A landing page concept exploring how message, proof, features and call-to-action can be structured to convert a first-time visitor without feeling like a shouted pitch. Full case-study visuals are being prepared.
